summary: Add todo doctor / reconcile command to detect committed .todo/ state that contradicts reality
description: Add a todo doctor / reconcile command that detects committed .todo/ state contradicting reality: ticket=done but resolution.commit unreachable from HEAD, ticket=active but branch gone, etc. Turns silent desync into a surfaced, fixable report; a safety net for state that lives in git and is edited by agents. New command under src/commands/, registered in src/cli.ts.

resolution.note: todo doctor reconciles .todo/ against git reality (missing/unreachable resolution commits, done-parent-with-open-child, deleted active branches, misfiled tickets, dangling refs). Verified clean on this repo and exit-1 on a broken store.
